Container.Name: Octave
Container.Overview: Sync Spotify playlists into Jellyfin, request missing albums in Lidarr, and enrich matching with ListenBrainz and Last.fm.
Container.Description: Octave keeps Spotify playlists mirrored into Jellyfin with per-playlist sync modes, cover art, missing-track reports, and optional Lidarr album requests. Spotify authentication uses PKCE; create your own Spotify app and enter its Client ID in Settings or in this template.

Config.Name: Web UI
Config.Description: Octave web interface.

Config.Name: Spotify OAuth Callback
Config.Description: Temporary PKCE OAuth callback listener. Add http://SERVER-IP:8888/callback or your reverse-proxy callback URL to your Spotify app redirect URIs.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Non-secret Octave config volume.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Runtime data, SQLite history, settings, and Spotify PKCE token cache.

Config.Name: Logs Path
Config.Description: Octave log files.

Config.Name: Spotify Client ID
Config.Description: Spotify app Client ID. Required for Spotify PKCE auth unless configured later in the Octave Settings UI.

Config.Name: Spotify Redirect URI
Config.Description: Optional explicit Spotify callback URI. Leave blank to let Octave infer it, or set your reverse-proxy callback such as https://octave.example.com/callback.

Config.Name: Jellyfin URL
Config.Description: Jellyfin URL reachable from the Octave container, for example http://192.168.1.10:8096.

Config.Name: Jellyfin API Key
Config.Description: Jellyfin API key. Can also be configured in Octave Settings.

Config.Name: Jellyfin User ID
Config.Description: Jellyfin user ID that owns created playlists.

Config.Name: Lidarr URL
Config.Description: Optional Lidarr URL reachable from the Octave container.

Config.Name: Lidarr API Key
Config.Description: Optional Lidarr API key for requesting missing albums.

Config.Name: Auth Username
Config.Description: HTTP Basic Auth username.

Config.Name: Auth Password
Config.Description: HTTP Basic Auth password. Leave blank for LAN-trust mode; set before exposing Octave outside your LAN.

Config.Name: Sync Schedule
Config.Description: Cron schedule for automatic sync. Empty disables scheduled sync.

Config.Name: Sync On Startup
Config.Description: Run a sync when the container starts.

Config.Name: Sync All Playlists
Config.Description: Set true to discover and sync all Spotify playlists visible to the connected account.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: IANA timezone for logs and scheduled syncs.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Python logging level.

Config.Name: ListenBrainz Token
Config.Description: Optional ListenBrainz user token.

Config.Name: Last.fm API Key
Config.Description: Optional Last.fm API key.

Config.Name: Last.fm Username
Config.Description: Optional Last.fm username for scrobble import workflows.
